slugs.5-steps-academy: Sripalan Chandra Mohan, an engineer by profession, has extensive experience in strategic planning, international business relations, finance, and marketing, starting as an entrepreneur in the computer hardware industry in the 1980s before diversifying into non-banking finance and social/environmental sustainability initiatives. As Executive Director of YBIS, he chairs the Academic and Examination Boards, drives high-quality affordable education, introduces programs for diverse learners and sports training, and inspires the teaching community.[Yuvabharathi International School Management Page](https://www.yuvabharathi.sg/index.php/aboutus/ybis-management)
slugs.american-international-school: Ms. Diana Lo is a passionate educator with nearly 20 years of experience, joining YMCA of Hong Kong Christian College in 2003 as one of its founding Science teachers. She has progressed through key leadership roles including Head of Department, Head of Pastoral Team, Assistant Principal, and Deputy Principal, contributing to initiatives like introducing the international IGCSE and GCE A-level curricula and strengthening pastoral care. She holds a BSc in Chemistry from the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, a Postgraduate Diploma in Education from Hong Kong Baptist University, and a Master's in Education from the Chinese University of Hong Kong.
slugs.ajman-academy: Natalia Svetenok is an experienced Principal and Educational Leader holding an M.Ed., MBA, and pursuing a Doctor of Education. She has served as Principal at Woodlem British School since July 2023, following roles as Vice Principal at The First Academy (2019-2023) and various leadership positions in UAE and Saudi Arabian schools since 2010. As an author, speaker, and innovator, she specializes in British and American curricula, educational psychology, NLP, and fostering school cultures focused on academic growth, teacher empowerment, and student wellbeing.
slugs.abedeen-international-school: Dr. Inderjeet Singh holds a PhD in Pharmaceutics and Drug Design (Distinction) from The University of Nottingham Malaysia Campus, an MEd in Educational Leadership and Management (1st Class) from UNITAR International University, a BS in Biotechnology, and a Diploma in Education. With over 15 years in education, he has progressed from lecturer and tutor roles to senior leadership positions including Senior Principal at St. John's International School and Assistant Vice President for Strategic Planning at Edumaax Education Group before becoming Executive Principal at Zenith International School in May 2023. He specializes in school strategic planning, operations, curriculum design, HR, and transformation to meet global standards.[Zenith International School Management Team](https://www.zenith.edu.my/team-manageent.php)[LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dr-inderjeet-singh-sidhu-6b1912180)
slugs.ait-international-school: Dr. Connie Kim is a Korean-American educator with a doctorate in educational leadership from Nova Southeastern University, a master’s from King's College London, and a bachelor’s in English and Political Science from UCLA. She began her career as a high school English teacher in Northern California in 1998 and has since worked across five countries (US, Hong Kong, South Korea, Vietnam, Thailand) in eight schools, holding leadership roles including principalships and head of school positions. At XCL American School of Bangkok, Sukhumvit, she drives academic excellence, multicultural inclusivity, personalized learning, and student well-being as Head of School.[Official Team Page](https://www.asbsk.ac.th/en/about-us/our-team)[Edarabia Interview](https://www.edarabia.com/where-cultures-connect-dr-connie-kims-vision-multicultural-education/)
